case_title: GLOBAL ACCESS TRAVEL GROUP INC. VS MAAZDA TRAVEL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO CHRISTINE KAO RETURNED SIGNED.
DEF. C/O CHRISTINE KAO WANTED TO FILE DEF'S CLAIM W/ $15 CK #1803.SYSTEM WON'T TAKE.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $373.60 FILED BY MAAZDA TRAVEL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GLOBAL ACCESS TRAVEL GROUP INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
ONLY TODAY, DEF'S CLAIM ACCEPTED BY SYSTEM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLOBAL ACCESS TRAVEL GROUP INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAAZDA TRAVEL $252.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $272.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,252.36 FILED BY GLOBAL ACCESS TRAVEL GROUP INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAAZDA TRAVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MAAZDA TRAVEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GLOBAL ACCESS TRAVEL GROUP INC. WAIVES SERVICE ON CROSS CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MAAZDA TRAVEL
